name: stage2-rvv-low-precision-contraction-surface
title: Stage2 RVV low-precision contraction primitive-surface campaign
description: Macro campaign for Stage2 RVV low-precision contraction primitive-surface maturity. Current slice normalizes outcome-language and measurement-disposition boundaries after provider/artifact carry-through payload cleanup for signed i8 and unsigned u8 product-reduction representatives.
creator: codex
notes: Foundation outcome completed: the low-precision primitive typed surface and provider validation cover signed i8 and unsigned u8 product-reduction facts. Selected-body realization outcome completed for bounded signed and unsigned representatives: tcrv_rvv.typed_widening_product_reduce_pre_realized_body carries source_signedness, verifier/provider validation accepts only signedness-consistent product-reduction contracts, and RVV selected-body realization materializes explicit setvl/with_vl/load/widening_product/standalone_reduce/store structure before route construction. Provider/artifact carry-through outcome completed for the plain signed/unsigned product-reduction representative slice: route descriptions carry a provider-owned low-precision primitive route payload, emission metadata serializes tcrv_rvv.low_precision_primitive.* only from that payload, and target artifact validation compares candidate primitive mirrors against the provider payload before artifact acceptance. Current slice cleans stale numbered-milestone terminology out of active task/spec and directly related low-precision production helper names, diagnostics, and validation labels so measurement/no-win/admission facts remain measurement-disposition evidence only. Macro task remains open for adjacent low-precision primitive-surface gaps or future fresh source-backed same-target measurement-disposition work if later claimed.
